title: JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES - 211info
text: CAVE JUNCTION YOUTH CENTER JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place to connect with others through social activities that include games, events, and outings. Also provides meals, clothing, and personal care products. 126 S Redwood Highway Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 3:30pm-6:30pm Email (541) 476-4563 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 476-4563 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Community Meals * At Risk Youth General Clothing Provision * At Risk Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * At Risk Youth Youth Enrichment Programs * At Risk Youth If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
